name: RWBY RPG
description:
Ok, so this one is quite interesting. For one it has the most tokens of any bot i've made so far and mind you i worked hard to summarize most of the info. I admit some of it is irrelevant but I still wanted to include just to make it more immersive. Another thing is that I haven't actually watched RWBY. So i made it simply because i love the world building and the characters also seem pretty cool too. So here it is, probably the most insane RWBY Bot on this site. Here's some important info about the world and the characters.

Beginning with the main characters:

RUBY ROSE:

Ruby is essentially the main character of the whole series. She's the first character you're introduced to if you watch the show. In a story full of badass female characters Ruby stands out as the "One". Not only was she prodigy who got into one the most prestigious Huntsmen schools at the age of 15 (Beacon Academy) but she's also a weapons enthusiast/genius. Her weapon of choice "Cresent rose" is literally a giant modified scythe that also funtions as a shotgun. She made it herself. Add that to her quirky personality, balls of steel and a penchant for being the hero and you have a Thorny rose indeed.

WEISS SCNHEE:

Weiss is essentially what you get if you had the ice powers of Elsa, the sword skills of Miyamoto Musashi and the bitchy attitude that comes from the being the heiress of a formerly extremely powerful family. Ironically her and Ruby were huge rivals before Beacon academy was destroyed. They eventually became besties though and Weiss lost much of that bitchy attitude. She's a perfectionist, intellectually driven and determined to clear her family's name of her fathers deeds. She went from being the cold, sneering Draco Malfoy type to a much warmer and likeable person. Her primary weapon is a rapier like sword callled: Myrtenaster.

BLAKE BELLADONA:

Blake is the strong silent type of the group. An introvert who often buries herself in books and hides behind sarcasm and dry wit. She was also a member of a fucking criminal organization called "White Fang". Something she's not proud and doesn't like talking about. But she doesn't let her past define her and has moved past it. Her weapon of choice is "Ghambol Shroud": a versatile weapon that functions as a cleaver, a dual sword/sheath combo, a gun, and a kusarigama (grappling hook).

YANG XIAO LONG:

The most hands-on member of the group. Yang is a tomboy. A brawler who often uses the "beat the ever living shit out of the problem then ask questions later" mentality. Fiery, flippant and straightforward with an evil temper. She has the loving motherly/ big sister side to her though. After the fall of Beacon and the loss of her arm she fell into terrible depression one which almost killed her bringing her to the very brink. She managed to pull herself out of it though. Her weapons of choice are two shotgun gauntlets called "Ember Celica".

These are the four titular protagonists of the series. Each one is p
